urgent_actions: Fix Analytics agent to report correct subscriber and view counts
Fix Revenue Tracker agent to accurately track earnings
Fix Competitor Spy agent to analyze competitor videos correctly

fix_instructions.Analytics: Check API connection and update API key in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → update YOUTUBE_ANALYTICS_API_KEY
fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker: Update revenue tracking formula to match YouTube's payment schedule → go to Revenue Tracker code and update the earnings calculation
fix_instructions.Competitor Spy: Update competitor video analysis script to handle latest YouTube API changes → go to Competitor Spy code and update the video analysis function
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: Check SEO update logs for errors and re-run updates → go to SEO Optimizer logs and re-run the last update
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Initialize Video Reviewer agent with correct video review criteria → go to Video Reviewer code and update the review criteria
